chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Transfer Application No.S- 52 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA 10412/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA 10413/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.12.2025. Mr. Muhammad Kaleemullah, Advocate for applicant. = This criminal transfer application has been filed on the ground that the I.D Complaint No.12/2024 has been delayed and no progress has been made on trial side. This is no ground for filing a transfer application. Accordingly the instant criminal transfer application is dismissed with observations that the trial Court shall endeavor to conclude the matter within a period of four months from the date of receipt of this order. The criminal transfer application stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Tufail
